name: limit-offset-values-window
query: SELECT ?value WHERE { VALUES ?value { 1 2 3 4 5 } } ORDER BY ?value LIMIT 2 OFFSET 1

name: limit-offset-seeded-predicate-window
query: PREFIX ex: <http://example.com/> SELECT ?p WHERE { ex:alice ?p ?o } ORDER BY STR(?p) LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

name: limit-offset-seeded-object-window
query: PREFIX ex: <http://example.com/> SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s ex:relatedTo ?o } ORDER BY STR(?s) STR(?o) LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0
